---
name: Join an assignment
about: Internal — opened automatically when you click an Accept / Create-team / Join-team link.
title: "join:<assignment-id>"
labels: join
---

**Don't open this manually.** Go to the assignment page and click the **Accept**, **Create team**, or **Join team** link. The link prefills the title for you.

If you came here by mistake, just close this issue — nothing will happen.
